description: Global program connecting new contributors with mentors to work on open-source projects.
Internships for groups underrepresented in the tech industry.
Mentorships on Linux Foundation projects (CNCF, Kubernetes, etc.).
12-week remote internship alternative focused on engineering skills.
Internship focused on Bitcoin and blockchain-related open-source projects.
Funds open-source organizations to hire technical writers for documentation.
Month-long event encouraging contributions to open-source repositories.
Opportunity to contribute to KDE software and community projects.
